title: nasturtium iberis
intro: Nasturtium iberis, also known as cress or tansy mustard, is a flowering plant of the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and peppery leaves. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of nasturtium iberis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory problems. Nasturtium iberis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
